message:
fix: TestEnsureRunning_UnhealthyTriggersRestart race condition (gt-1wwbk)

The test runningFn always returned (1234, true) regardless of stop/start
calls. After stopLocked() + backoff sleep, the TOCTOU guard in
restartWithBackoff re-checked isRunning() which still returned true,
causing it to skip the start entirely.

Fix: use atomic.Bool to track running state across stop/start mock
transitions, so the TOCTOU guard correctly sees the server as stopped
after stopFn is called.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
